folders.purpose: Application binaries and packaged dependencies staged on the DB test server.
Optional copy of the RDPWin client or helper launch assets.
Canonical config artifacts such as GroupToServer5.txt or RDPWinPath5.txt.
Actian Zen client installers and extracted support files.
Vendor utilities, DSN exports, and database maintenance tools.
All discovery data hosted by DBTEST01.
Top-level container for logo-specific Actian Zen data sets.
Template layout for each non-production logo/database copy.
Primary Zen database files for a single logo.
Logo-specific users.dat and related user-state files.
Controlled export/drop zone for that logo.
Shared non-logo-specific data required by the app.
Published UNC share roots presented to the TERM discovery host.
Read-only share target for client binaries and shared app files.
Read-mostly share target for centralized config artifacts.
Share target for logo-specific and shared discovery data.
Operational material owned by the discovery team.
Installer logs, service logs, and test-run artifacts.
Probe output copied from the TERM discovery host or local DB probe runs.
Operator scripts and one-off remediation helpers stored outside git.
Registry exports, ODBC exports, share manifests, and config snapshots.
Controlled ingress and egress area for approved non-production media.
Landing zone for imported installers or data sets before validation.
Prepared exports or evidence bundles leaving the server.
Manual backup and rollback material for discovery testing.
Operator-created backups before risky changes.
Exported snapshots or recovered copies retained during testing.

shares.name: RDPAPPS$
shares.description: Hidden share for published app binaries and launcher assets.

shares.name: RDPCONFIG$
shares.description: Hidden share for shared RDPWin config files.

shares.name: RDPDATA$
shares.description: Hidden share for logo data and shared application data.
